typography.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#D4A373] font-semibold

visual_enhancers.particles: MANDATORY: Use react-tsparticles to create a subtle, elegant field of glowing muted gold dust particles drifting slowly over the deep navy background. Configuration: low density, slow movement, varying opacities.
visual_enhancers.geometric_shapes: MANDATORY: Use framer-motion to create floating, rotating geometric shapes (hollow cubes, pyramids, intersecting rings) in the background. Use 1px #D4A373 strokes with low opacity (10-20%) to add depth without clutter.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use pure crystal glassmorphism for sticky nav and floating cards. backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-[#0D1B2A]/40, and a 1px border of rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.15).
visual_enhancers.hover_interactions: No static elements. Cards must have a 'tracing beam' or glowing border on hover. Buttons must have magnetic hover effects or a scale-up with an ambient gold drop-shadow.
visual_enhancers.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for parallax scrolling. Text blocks should fade up and reveal on scroll. Images should have a slow zoom inside their containers.

components.navigation: Floating glass pill menu at the top center, or a sleek edge-to-edge glass bar. Must include links to About, Experience, Projects, Contact, and social icons (lucide-react).
components.hero: Full screen (min-h-screen). Massive 'Mokshagna Bingi' typography. Subtitle: 'AI/ML Developer & Full-Stack Engineer'. Particle background + floating geometry. An animated 'scroll down' gold line or mouse icon.
components.about_bento: Bento grid layout. Mix text cards with image cards. Break symmetry. Use col-span-2 or row-span-2 to create visual tension.
components.education_timeline: A glowing gold vertical line. As the user scrolls, nodes along the line light up. Do NOT use simple stacked cards.
components.experience: Glassmorphism cards for the 5 internships. On hover, the border glows #D4A373 and the card tilts slightly using 3D transform. Content: Company, Role, Dates, Impact.
components.skills: Instead of a boring list, use a continuous marquee (react-fast-marquee) of tech stack logos/names, or a floating orbital layout.
components.projects: Masonry grid or horizontal scroll track for 30+ projects. High-quality imagery with gradient overlays. Hover reveals the tech stack and a 'View Project' CTA.
components.certifications: Dense grid of sleek minimalist tiles. 15+ certs means they should be compact. Hover to expand or show a glowing badge.
components.contact_form: Premium Apple-style form. Minimalist. Inputs have no visible background, only a bottom border that transitions to glowing gold on focus. Include Resend email logic integration instructions.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL REQUIRED LIBRARIES: yarn add framer-motion react-tsparticles tsparticles react-fast-marquee lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
MANDATORY: NO BASIC CARDS. You MUST use framer-motion to add entrance animations (staggered fade up) and complex hover states (tilt, border glow, shadow expansion) to EVERY card.
COLOR THEME STRICT ENFORCEMENT: Only use #0D1B2A (Navy) and #D4A373 (Gold) and their shades. Absolutely NO thick blue or cyber funk (neon cyan/magenta).
GEOMETRY: Use framer-motion to create floating SVG geometric outlines in the background of sections to fulfill the 'geometric shapes' requirement.
PARTICLES: Implement 'react-tsparticles' in the Hero section for glowing gold dust. This is a strict requirement.
TYPOGRAPHY: Import and use 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts in your layout.
TIMELINE: For Education, build a vertical line that tracks scroll progress (use framer-motion useScroll).
TESTING: Add data-testid to every single interactive element (buttons, form inputs, nav links, project cards).
UX: Ensure contrast ratios are accessible. The text over dark navy should be a crisp off-white.
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but strip out the Vercel-like borders. Use bottom-border only styles for a premium look.
